name: Raisin Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out all ingredients.
2. Pour the oil into a bowl.
3. Add water, powdered milk, yeast, and molasses to the oil.
4. Mix in sugar and salt.
5. Gradually add flour mixture until combined.
6. Fold in raisins.
7. Pour batter into bread pan.
8. Place in preheated oven and bake according to recipe instructions.
